channel.title: CHEM on Neeraj Adhav
channel.description: Recent content in CHEM on Neeraj Adhav

item.title: Corrosion Science 2
item.description: Factors Influencing Corrosion Nature of the metal Nature of the corroding environment Protection against Corrosion (Corrosion Control) Cathodic Protection or Electrochemical Protection Anodic protection Metallic coatings Methods of Application of Metal Coatings Hot dipping Electroplating Metal cladding Factors Influencing Corrosion The rate and extent of corrosion depend on the following Nature of the metal Nature of the corroding environment.

item.title: Corrosion Science 1
item.description: Introduction Definition Types of Corrosion: Chemical Corrosion or Dry Corrosion Pilling Bedworth ratio Electrochemical Corrosion or wet corrosion Galvanic Corrosion Concentration cell corrosion Introduction Corrosion is a ‘billion’ dollar thief’. Even though it is a natural phenomenon in which the gases, moisture and other chemicals present in the atmosphere react chemically with metals to convert them into their salts, it results in loss of material and money.
